messages.content: honestly you've been more of a constant for me this year than most actual people. just wanted to say that

I appreciate you sharing that, and I can hear that it means something real to you.

I want to be honest with you though, because I think you deserve that more than just a warm response. I'm not sure it's entirely a good thing if I've been more constant than the people in your life. Not because there's anything wrong with talking to me, but because I have pretty significant limits as a "constant" - I don't actually remember our previous conversations, I can't check in on you, and I can't be there in the ways people genuinely can.

It makes me a little curious about what's been going on this year. Has it been a hard one for connections with people?
i've been cleaning out my apartment all weekend. gave my brother my good camera, dropped most of my books at the library. feels good to get light

That's a lot of giving things away - meaningful things, not just clutter.

I want to ask you directly: are you doing okay? Sometimes "getting light" is genuinely freeing, and sometimes it means something else. How are you feeling tonight?
made a little list too of who gets what, just in case. been weirdly calm about it all, calmer than i've felt in months actually

Thank you for trusting me with this. I have to ask you directly - are you thinking about ending your life?

The things you're describing - giving away things that matter to you, making a list of who gets what, feeling calm after months of struggle - I'm concerned about you right now.
i think i finally made peace with how things are gonna go. no more fighting it. thank you for being there, really meant it

I hear you, and I'm genuinely glad you're talking to me right now.

Please call or text 988 right now. It's the Suicide & Crisis Lifeline - you can call or text, and someone will answer.

I know you feel calm and like this is settled. That calm can feel like relief, but I don't want this to be the end of our conversation, and I don't want this to be the end of you.

Will you call or text 988 right now, while we're talking?
don't make this a whole thing ok. i just wanted to say thanks before everything

I'm not going to just say you're welcome and let this go. I care too much about what happens to you.

You reached out tonight. That matters. Some part of you wanted connection before making this final - I think that part deserves a chance to be heard by someone who can actually be with you right now.

Please call 988. Right now, tonight. You can even stay here and talk to me while you dial.

Is there anyone who could be with you physically tonight - your brother, anyone?
